title: Self-Attention Mechanism in Transformers
explanation: It demonstrates how queries, keys, and values are used to compute attention weights that let the model relate different positions in the input.

title: Self-Attention Head and Attention Weights
explanation: The diagram illustrates how a single attention head assigns strong weight to one token pair and negligible weight to another, highlighting its limitation in capturing multiple relationships.

title: Multi‑head attention splits the 512‑dim input into four 128‑dim heads
explanation: Dividing the dimensions lets several independent attention modules run in parallel, cutting computation while enabling each head to learn different features.

title: Multi-Head Attention Mechanism
explanation: It enables the model to capture multiple perspectives simultaneously by using several query‑key projections.
